SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-16-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-16-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY ENNY CUDNY, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT JANET LAZANO DANZ. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANZ, JANET LAZANO $913.15 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $998.15 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT DANZ, JANET LAZANO
